## Summary
What does this change do?

## Type
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Receipt schema / format
- [ ] PolicyGate / enforcement
- [ ] Signing / verification
- [ ] Demo / examples
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Security & evidence checklist
- [ ] Does this change affect what is considered “trusted boundary” code?
- [ ] If receipts changed: are they backward compatible, or versioned?
- [ ] If policy changed: did you add tests for allow/deny behavior?
- [ ] If signing changed: did you document key expectations and verification impact?
- [ ] Did you add or update tests?

## Notes for reviewers
Anything risky, subtle, or worth calling out?
